identityRules: Preserve each entity identity while cross-linking through the OS hub.
Use Industrial Noir as the global system aesthetic.
Keep profile image, banner, tone, and CTA consistent per entity.

entities.name: Lingo Legacy LLC
entities.mission: Build the Industrial Noir ecosystem connecting play, culture, commerce, and community.
entities.typography: bold condensed headers, clean sans body
entities.tagline: The OS for culture, play, and legacy.
entities.pitch: Lingo Legacy LLC powers the ecosystem behind Lingo.ai, Cycles, commerce, media, and community activations.
entities.profileRule: Crown mark on dark Industrial Noir field.
entities.bannerRule: Map-grid texture with gold crown and active entity lanes.

entities.name: Lingo.ai
entities.mission: Turn language, gameplay, and AI-guided missions into XP-powered play.
entities.typography: game UI display headers, readable sans body
entities.pitch: Lingo.ai is the browser game and AI app where players complete language missions, earn XP, and unlock drops.
entities.profileRule: Lingo.ai glyph or character avatar with neon edge glow.
entities.bannerRule: Gameplay frame, XP bar, and Crown drop CTA.

entities.name: The Iconic House of Avalon, Inc.
entities.mission: Advance cultural preservation, community programs, houses, events, and intergenerational legacy.
entities.typography: formal serif accents, clean sans body
entities.tagline: Culture in motion. Legacy in formation.
entities.pitch: Avalon is the nonprofit cultural house for archives, programs, events, and community uplift.
entities.profileRule: Avalon crest or house mark on ivory/noir background.
entities.bannerRule: Archive, ballroom, and community imagery with understated Crown treatment.

entities.name: Peaches Keys
entities.mission: Represent character-led storytelling, creator spotlights, and community hooks.
entities.typography: expressive display accents, clean sans body
entities.pitch: Peaches Keys anchors spotlight content, character drops, and creator-led activation moments.
entities.profileRule: Character-forward portrait or icon with peach/crown accents.
entities.bannerRule: Spotlight frame with quote, drop cue, and Lingo.ai cross-link.
